title: USDA Food Access Research Atlas
description: Census-tract-level food access indicators. The CensusTract column sometimes gets read as float64 by Excel readers, which truncates it -- we handle this in ingestion. PovertyRate can exceed 100 in a few tracts due to denominator revisions; we cap at 100.

urban.description: True for urban tracts, false for rural

low_access_1.description: Low access at 1 mile (urban) or 10 miles (rural)

low_access_half.description: Low access at 0.5 mile (urban) or 10 miles (rural)

lila_1_and_10.description: Low income AND low access at 1/10 mile threshold
